isolation.apiKeys: none configured — API calls fail with error toast

steps.action: Navigate to /kanvas?studio=worldview, create scene, seed world+take state
steps.expected: Canvas mode renders with world card and take
steps.observed: Canvas mode renders correctly with WorldCard (Test World, Marble 0.1-plus badge) and Take 1 in takes grid

steps.action: Inspect DOM for motion.div elements wrapping mode content in canvas mode
steps.expected: motion.div with Framer Motion animation styles present
steps.observed: Found div.space-y-4 with style='opacity: 1; transform: none;' (Framer Motion animated wrapper), div.group.relative with same styles (WorldCard), and outer collapse wrapper with 'height: auto; opacity: 1;'

steps.action: Click Enter World to switch to world-viewer mode
steps.expected: Mode switches with AnimatePresence transition, motion.div present
steps.observed: GSplatViewer renders in motion.div (relative h-[520px]) with style='opacity: 1; transform: none;'. Mode transition animated via AnimatePresence

steps.action: Close viewer, hover take card, click Compose Shot to switch to shot-composer mode
steps.expected: Shot composer renders with AnimatePresence transition, motion.div present
steps.observed: ShotComposer renders in motion.div (space-y-4) with style='opacity: 1; transform: none;'. AnimatePresence mode='wait' confirmed in source code wrapping all three mode views

steps.action: Verify source code has AnimatePresence mode='wait' around mode content
steps.observed: Confirmed at WorldviewSection.tsx line 1813: <AnimatePresence mode='wait'> wraps all three mode components (WorldviewCanvas key='canvas', GSplatViewer key='world-viewer', ShotComposer key='shot-composer')

evidence.domInspection: motion.div elements confirmed in all 3 modes with opacity:1;transform:none style (Framer Motion signature). AnimatePresence mode='wait' at line 1813 of WorldviewSection.tsx. Outer AnimatePresence wraps collapsible section at line 1793.

assertions.title: Take flows from viewer to canvas

steps.action: Seed world in active scene and enter world-viewer mode
steps.expected: World viewer renders with camera HUD and Capture Take button
steps.observed: GSplatViewer renders with 35mm lens, 100% zoom, viewfinder, and Capture Take pill button
Toast 'Take captured!' appeared with 'View' action button

steps.action: Click Close viewer (X) to return to canvas mode
steps.expected: Canvas mode shows new take in takes grid
steps.observed: Canvas mode restored. TAKES section shows 2 takes: original 'Take 1' (seeded) and newly captured take, both with 35mm f/1.8 camera info badges

evidence.network: Take capture uses canvas.toDataURL locally, no network request

assertions.title: Generated shots flow from composer to canvas

steps.action: Seed a generated shot in the store via addGeneratedShot action (since API keys not configured)
steps.expected: Store accepts the generated shot with nano-banana model

steps.action: Verify canvas mode shows generated shot in GENERATED SHOTS grid
steps.expected: Generated shot card appears with model badge
steps.observed: GENERATED SHOTS section visible with shot card showing placeholder image and 'nano-banana' model badge (green badge with sparkle icon at bottom)

evidence.network: N/A — shot seeded via store action, no API call

steps.action: Set capturing=true in store while in world-viewer mode
steps.expected: Loader2 spinner appears on Capture Take button, button disabled
steps.observed: Capture Take button: disabled=true, className includes 'bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-400 cursor-not-allowed'. SVG with class 'lucide-loader-circle h-4 w-4 animate-spin' present (Loader2 spinning)

steps.action: Inspect take card loading state in source code
steps.expected: Take card shows Loader2 overlay when status='capturing'
steps.observed: Source confirms: when take.status === 'capturing', a full overlay with Loader2 h-5 w-5 animate-spin text-amber-400 renders over the take card

steps.action: Enter shot composer, set generatingShot=true in store
steps.expected: Spinner on send button + overlay with building text on prompt area
steps.observed: Two Loader2 spinners visible: (1) 'Building...' text with Loader2 h-5 w-5 animate-spin text-amber-400 in prompt area, (2) Send button disabled with Loader2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin. Send button class includes 'bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-5' (disabled state)

evidence.domInspection: During capture: 1 animate-spin element on button. During generation: 2 animate-spin elements (prompt overlay + send button). Both use Loader2 (lucide-loader-circle) with amber accent.

frictions.description: Store seeding required understanding the correct World type structure (displayName, assets.thumbnailUrl, prompt field) — the task prompt's seeding snippet used a flat structure that caused a crash (Cannot read properties of undefined reading 'thumbnailUrl'). Had to use addWorld + assignWorldToScene actions instead of direct setState.
frictions.resolution: Used proper store actions (addWorld, assignWorldToScene, addTake, addGeneratedShot) with correct type shapes from src/types/worldview.ts

frictions.description: Loading states for capture and generation are transient (resolve in <1s since API calls fail immediately). Had to manually set store flags (setCapturing, setGeneratingShot) to observe the loading UI.
frictions.resolution: Used store actions to manually set capturing=true and generatingShot=true, then verified the DOM has Loader2 spinners and disabled button states

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-CROSS-002 confirmed AnimatePresence mode='wait' wrapping mode content with motion.div elements in all 3 modes. VAL-CROSS-004 confirmed takes flow from viewer to canvas with thumbnail and camera badges. VAL-CROSS-005 confirmed generated shots appear in canvas with model badge. VAL-POLISH-004 confirmed Loader2 spinners during capture (on button) and generation (on send button + building overlay).
